# Tom Sesler — Product Designer & Web Developer

> Tom Sesler designs and builds digital products. Personal brand page linking to his portfolio and web design agency.

## About

Tom Sesler is a product designer and web developer based in Erie, PA. He designs and builds digital products — from research-driven UX through live shipped software. This site (tomsesler.com) is his personal brand page, connecting visitors to his main properties.

## Primary Links

- https://straydesign.co — Product design portfolio. Case studies, shipped products, and design process work.
- https://straywebdesign.co — Stray Web Design, Tom's web design agency building enterprise-grade websites for small businesses in Erie, PA.

## Skills & Expertise

- Product Design (end-to-end, research through shipped interfaces)
- UX Research (ethnographic, heuristic evaluation, usability testing)
- UX/UI Design (Figma, prototyping, design systems)
- Web Development (React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS)
- Web Design Agency (client websites, branding, digital strategy)

## Contact

- Email: tom@straydesign.co
- Portfolio: https://straydesign.co
- Agency: https://straywebdesign.co
- Personal: https://tomsesler.com

## Related Projects

- https://firstday.life — FirstDay, AI-powered goal achievement platform (designed and built by Tom)
- https://stray.run — Stray Run, Tom's clothing brand
